name: hn-techpulse-remotion
description: Remotion renderer for HN TechPulse video pipeline

scripts.build: npx remotion render HNTechComposition src/index.ts --props props.json out/output.mp4
scripts.render: npx remotion render HNTechComposition src/index.ts --props props.json out/output.mp4
scripts.still: npx remotion still HNTechComposition src/index.ts --props props.json --frame=0 out/preview.png
